Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 1. Understand the Users Goal: The user wants to modify a given DECLARE process model represented as a Python dictionary by adding constraints that mitigate bias in a loan application review process. The bias relates to sensitive attributes Age Gender Race. Add constraints like coexistence response succession nonsuccession to enforce fairness checks ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck before decisions.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 2. Analyze the Input Model: The input is a Python dictionary with keys for various DECLARE constraints. Currently it has existence StartApplication FinalDecision init StartApplication coexistence StartApplication FinalDecision response StartApplication RequestAdditionalInfo succession RequestAdditionalInfo FinalDecision All other constraint types are empty dictionaries. The structure for binary constraints is constraint_type source_act target_act support 1.0 confidence 1.0 unary act support 1.0 confidence 1.0

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: 3. Identify Bias Mitigation Strategies in DECLARE: Introduce activities CheckSensitiveAttributes BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview. New constraints: coexistence FinalDecision ManualReview response CheckSensitiveAttributes BiasMitigationCheck nonsuccession CheckSensitiveAttributes FinalDecision precedence BiasMitigationCheck FinalDecision existence ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 4. Construct the Updated Dictionary: Merge new constraints into provided structure. Add to existence ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck. Add to coexistence FinalDecision ManualReview. Add to response CheckSensitiveAttributes BiasMitigationCheck. Add to precedence BiasMitigationCheck FinalDecision. Add to nonsuccession CheckSensitiveAttributes FinalDecision.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: 5. Draft Rationale: Explain added constraints: existence ensures fairness activities mandatory. coexistence FinalDecision ManualReview guarantees human oversight. response CheckSensitiveAttributes BiasMitigationCheck forces counter prejudice. precedence mandates check before decision. nonsuccession prevents direct sensitive to decision.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 6. Refine Verify: Double-check DECLARE semantics dictionary format. Adjust precedence to BiasMitigationCheck FinalDecision for clarity. Verify syntax constraint types support confidence 1.0. Align with prompt examples loan context sensitive attributes.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self-Correction: Adjust precedence dictionary from FinalDecision BiasMitigationCheck to BiasMitigationCheck FinalDecision to match standard DECLARE precedence A precedes B. Reconstruct dictionary accordingly. Verify all semantics response coexistence nonsuccession correct.
